name: Oldbab Leves (String Bean Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh string beans, cut into 1 inch pieces
Salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the chicken broth in a large 3-1/2 quart saucepan.
2. Add the beans and onions and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender but still firm.
3. Heat the butter in a 1 quart saucepan.
4. Add the garlic and cook over low heat for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the paprika and flour with a spatula.
6. Slowly blend in the cold water to form a thick paste.
7. Stir the paste into the hot soup and simmer, stirring constantly, until the soup has thickened slightly.
8. Add the vinegar and parsley, and noodles.
9. Serve hot.
